title: Super Smash Bros Ultimate *click*
description: A simple sound from Super Smash Bros Ultimate to replace Minecraft's default click sound!
body:
**Super Smash Bros Ultimate** **\*click\*** is a simple sound pack which replaces the default click sound that you can hear when using different menus in Minecraft, from a sound coming from SSBU which is way smoother, yet not disturbing. Try it yourself!


Sound from [Super Smash Bros. Ultimate](https://www.smashbros.com/) and edited by myself.
